_doc: Use this template when outbound traffic must go through a corporate HTTP proxy, or when the gateway requires mutual TLS client certificates.
_proxy_hint: Supports http://, https://, and socks5:// schemes.
_jwt_hint: Shell command whose stdout is the Bearer token. Refreshed every jwt_ttl_seconds.
_mtls_hint: Both mtls_cert and mtls_key must be set together. mtls_ca is optional (custom CA bundle).
